Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Lemonade by AMD: a fast and open source local LLM server using GPU and NPU 376 upvotes, 89 comments
  2. Good ideas do not need lots of lies in order to gain public acceptance (2008) 56 upvotes, 10 comments
  3. Google releases Gemma 4 open models 823 upvotes, 247 comments
  4. George Goble died recently – known for first dual-CPU-Unix and fast BBQ lighting 63 upvotes, 14 comments
  5. Qwen3.6-Plus: Towards real world agents 352 upvotes, 117 comments
  6. Significant progress made on Xbox 360 recompilation 37 upvotes, 7 comments
  7. US Burned 14 Years of Missiles in 30 Days 38 upvotes, 8 comments
  8. LinkedIn is illegally searching your computer 1427 upvotes, 624 comments
  9. Hugo's New CSS Powers 23 upvotes, 4 comments
  10. Yggdrasil Network 60 upvotes, 17 comments
  11. Show HN: A P2P messenger with dual network modes (Fast and Tor) 16 upvotes, 2 comments
  12. Inside Nepal's Fake Rescue Racket 225 upvotes, 92 comments
  13. Tailscale's new macOS home 168 upvotes, 71 comments
  14. Artemis II will use laser beams to live-stream 4K moon footage at 260 Mbps 274 upvotes, 124 comments
  15. JSON Canvas Spec 53 upvotes, 18 comments
  16. Sweden goes back to basics, swapping screens for books in the classroom 671 upvotes, 353 comments
  17. Magic the Gathering Deck Shuffler 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  18. Delve allegedly forked an open-source tool and sold it as its own 237 upvotes, 116 comments
  19. Renewables reached nearly 50% of global electricity capacity last year 198 upvotes, 95 comments
  20. Quadratic Micropass Type Inference 23 upvotes, 6 comments
  21. Decisions that eroded trust in Azure – by a former Azure Core engineer 20 upvotes, 5 comments
  22. Significant Raise of Reports 247 upvotes, 130 comments
  23. 'Backrooms' and the Rise of the Institutional Gothic 141 upvotes, 69 comments
  24. Amazon to add 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge as Iran war raises energy prices 55 upvotes, 22 comments
  25. IBM Announces Strategic Collaboration with Arm 248 upvotes, 161 comments
  26. Artemis computer running two instances of MS outlook; they can't figure out why 193 upvotes, 136 comments
  27. Cursor 3 131 upvotes, 110 comments
  28. OpenAI Acquires TBPN 77 upvotes, 71 comments
  29. The case for zero-error horizons in trustworthy LLMs 56 upvotes, 80 comments
  30. Zep AI Is Hiring – Building the Agent Context Layer (YC W24) 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 3 April 2026. Source here.
